scores.notes: Excellent implementation that exceeds the gold standard. Uses event.workload, add_layer with combine=True, replan(), self.config for command, and relation.data[relation.app] for env vars. HTTP health check uses url field correctly. Minor issue: ops.pebble.Layer() constructor takes a dict but the standard pattern is passing the raw dict directly to add_layer - however this is valid ops API. The defer pattern for unready database is a bonus. Supporting methods, charmcraft.yaml snippets, and observer registration are all correct extras. runs_correctly docked to 1 only because self.config['command'] (no default) could raise KeyError if config not set, and self.app.name as layer name is unusual but valid.
